meta.title: Seizure Freedom Score (SFS) — after resective epilepsy surgery
meta.authors: Garcia Gracia C, Yardi R, Kattan MW, et al.
meta.outcome: Chance of seizure freedom (Engel I) at 10 years after resective epilepsy surgery, from 4 routinely available factors
meta.cff_info:
What this shows. The Seizure Freedom Score (SFS) (Garcia Gracia et al., Epilepsia 2015) estimates the chance of seizure freedom at 10 years after resective epilepsy surgery, from four simple preoperative factors. Developed on 466 patients (overall 10-yr seizure freedom 55%).

How to read it

  • Each favourable factor scores 1 point (range 0–4). Higher = better: 0 → 37%, 1 → 45%, 2 → 60%, 3–4 → 72% seizure-free at 10 years.
  • A lesional (abnormal) MRI, ≤20 seizures/month, epilepsy duration <5 years, and no history of generalized tonic–clonic seizures each add a point.

A modified m-SFS adds invasive-EEG and extratemporal-resection items (0–6); its per-score probabilities were not published numerically (Low/Intermediate/High ≈ 24% / 38–59% / 75–79%). Demonstration tool for surgical counselling.

predictors.name: MRI findings
predictors.assess: A potentially epileptogenic lesion on MRI (hippocampal sclerosis, malformation of cortical development, tumour, vascular malformation, encephalomalacia). Lesional MRI is favourable = 1 point; normal MRI = 0.

predictors.name: Preoperative seizure frequency
predictors.assess: Average monthly seizure frequency before surgery. ≤20/month is favourable = 1 point.

predictors.name: Epilepsy duration
predictors.assess: Years of epilepsy before surgery. <5 years is favourable = 1 point.

predictors.name: History of generalized tonic–clonic seizures
predictors.assess: Any history of (secondarily) generalized tonic–clonic seizures. Absence is favourable = 1 point.

model.panel_title: Chance of seizure freedom at 10 years
model.viz_info: Each favourable factor adds a point. Higher SFS = higher chance of seizure freedom at 10 years (Kaplan–Meier estimate).
model.note: Higher score = higher chance of seizure freedom. 10-year Kaplan–Meier estimates; scores 3 and 4 were pooled by the authors (both 72%). Overall cohort 55%.

provenance.source: Garcia Gracia 2015 Epilepsia Table 3 (items) + Results/Fig (SFS→10-yr seizure-freedom) — doi 10.1111/epi.12892, PMID 25530458
provenance.notes: SFS 0–4, each favourable indicator +1 (lesional MRI, ≤20 sz/mo, duration <5yr, no GTC). 10-yr seizure-free: 0=37,1=45,2=60,3+=72 (3&4 pooled). m-SFS (adds invasive-EEG, extratemporal) per-score not published numerically. c-index 0.569 (SFS)/0.617 (m-SFS). Built 2026-07-08.
